sources.reason: no-spec-static-html-direct-parseable: probe-reachability returned standard_http (200, 179ms via stdlib). The page is a single static HTML document with no XHR/API endpoints behind it; comment-marker-delimited sections (MAIN HEADLINE, LINKS FIRST COLUMN, LINKS SECOND COLUMN, TOP LEFT STARTS HERE) and font color=red attributes are all directly parseable from the response body. A browser-sniff would only confirm what curl already reveals.
